name: move_head
description:
Move the robot's head to a target pose.

Example:
    Move head up 10mm and roll 15 degrees:
    move_head(z=10, roll=15, duration=2.0)

optional.name: duration
optional.description: Duration of the movement in seconds

optional.name: degrees
optional.description: If True (default), angles are in degrees

optional.name: mm
optional.description: If True (default), positions are in millimeters
